name: Nutty Chocolate Stars
recipeIngredient: 3 cups QUAKER Oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
6-7 ounces Milk chocolate candy stars -or- kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, beat margarine and sugar until fluffy.
4. Blend in egg and vanilla extract.
5. Add the combined oats, flour, and baking soda; mix well.
6. Form the mixture into small balls (about 1-inch).
7. Roll each ball in nuts.
8. Place the cookies on the prepared cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
10. Remove from the oven and gently press chocolate candy stars into the center of each cookie.
11. Allow to cool for 2 minutes on the cookie sheet, then transfer to a wire rack.
12. Let cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
Makes approximately 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
Notes:
Dough may be covered and stored in the refrigerator for up to two days.
Candied cherries can be substituted for chocolate candy if desired.
